# CreditSniper

> AI-powered consumer credit defense. Analyzes credit reports, identifies FCRA and FDCPA violations, generates dispute letters with real statute citations, and delivers via certified or regular mail. Built by Swarm & Bee Intelligence.

CreditSniper-27B is a Qwen3.5-27B fine-tune trained on 84,115 consumer credit defense pairs covering FCRA Section 611/623/609, FDCPA Section 805/806/809, FACTA identity theft provisions, and ECOA equal credit opportunity. The model passes adversarial tests including wrong-statute traps and FDCPA/original-creditor distinction.

## Product

- [CreditSniper App](https://creditsniper.xyz/app): Paste your credit report, get analysis, generate dispute letters, print or mail them
- [Pricing](https://creditsniper.xyz/pricing): Free trial (1 analysis + 2 letters), Pro $49/mo unlimited, Business custom

## How It Works

1. Consumer pastes credit report text
2. CreditSniper-27B analyzes every tradeline, identifies errors and violations
3. Dispute letters generated with account-specific statute citations
4. Consumer prints letters (free) or we mail via USPS ($1.99 regular, $4.99 certified)

## Legal Coverage

- FCRA Section 611 — dispute investigation procedures
- FCRA Section 623 — furnisher accuracy obligations
- FCRA Section 609 — consumer disclosure rights
- FDCPA Section 809 — debt validation
- FDCPA Section 805 — communication restrictions
- FDCPA Section 806 — harassment prohibition
- FACTA — identity theft and fraud alert provisions
- ECOA — equal credit opportunity

## Privacy

We don't store credit report data. We don't mine consumer data. All processing occurs in memory on bare-metal hardware owned by Swarm & Bee Intelligence. No cloud. No third-party access.

## Contact

- Email: build@swarmandbee.ai
- Parent company: [Swarm & Bee Intelligence](https://swarmandbee.ai)
- ENS: creditsniper.eth
